summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Cloud Identity Security Dashboard with role-based access control. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate), role-based authentication and authorization fully functional, personalized greetings and dashboard views working correctly. Modal functionality partially working - offboarding and credential modals work perfectly, but alert detail modals have click handler issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Alert rows are not clickable - modal does not open when alerts are clicked
ui_bugs.selector: Alert table rows in threats section
ui_bugs.impact: Users cannot view alert details, IP addresses, failed attempts, or perform alert actions (resolve/investigate/dismiss)
ui_bugs.working_alternative: Offboarding and credential modals work perfectly with same modal framework

issues: Chart rendering warnings in console for width/height

passed_tests: Admin login with correct credentials and role verification
Team Member login with correct credentials and role verification
Team Lead login with correct credentials and role verification
Personalized greetings (Good Morning/Afternoon/Evening) for all users
Role-based dashboard views (Admin sees full view, Team Member sees personal view)
Administrator badge display for admin users
Team Member badge display for team member users
Role-based metrics (Admin sees all metrics, Team Member sees only assigned tasks)
Role-based alert access (Admin sees all alerts, Team Member sees only assigned alerts)
Alert detail API access with proper role-based restrictions
Offboarding detail modals open and display employee information correctly
Offboarding access revocation with timer functionality
Credential detail modals open and display rotation information
All backend APIs (100% success rate for role-based testing)

high_priority: Fix alert detail modal click handlers in ThreatSection component - alerts are not clickable despite backend API working perfectly
Investigate why handleItemClick function for alert type is not being triggered on alert row clicks
Verify alert table row elements have proper cursor-pointer styling and click event handlers
medium_priority: Fix chart width/height console warnings by ensuring chart containers have proper dimensions
